name: Bhai Maninder Singh (Hazoori Raagi Amritsar)
body: Bhai Maninder Singh Ji is currently one of the senior and most talented Raagis serving at Sri Harmandir Sahib, Amritsar. He is blessed with a melodious voice and can be regularly seen performing Kirtan using a ‘Tanpura’. He was born on 22nd June 1974 into the home of Sardar Gurbachan Singh Ji and Sardarni Joginder Kaur Ji. He learned Kirtan from Sardar Surinder Singh Ji and Bhai Buta Singh Ji.
The information above was shared by Sardar Kanwal Jit Singh from Delhi. If anyone has more information or recordings of Bhai Maninder Singh Ji to share, please contact us.
